name: Brick Pearson - Kinktober
description:
So like... Does he need a tarp or somethin'?

Brick knew that watching those pornos wasn't gonna keep him on the straight and narrow. But sometimes when you're gone, he just gets the itch. Has to rub a quick one out before you get home. But he kinda fell into a bit of a rabbit hole with this one and... well shit, its kinda hot?

He only has two questions really. Would you want to, and does he need a tarp or something? What if he ruins the sheets? Maybe the shower would work?

CW: Uh, piss obviously. He should be normal other than that tbh.

!!!PENIS AHEAD!!!
